description: Input accepted by generated correction-event lifecycle operations.

authority.description: Claimed correction authority; not trusted without a trusted authority receipt.

behavior_class.description: Stable behavior class for semantic correction identity.

delivery_id.description: Stable delivery identifier for this correction event.

desired_behavior.description: Behavior the correction says should replace the previous behavior.

dry_run.description: When true, report the intended operation without applying a storage mutation.

evidence_hash.description: Hash of evidence supporting the correction.

evidence_ref.description: Reference to evidence supporting the correction.

idempotency_key.description: Optional stable key used to identify repeated deliveries.

invariant_id.description: Stable semantic invariant identifier for deduplication.

predecessor_event_id.description: Prior correction event being disputed, withdrawn, or superseded.

producer_class.description: Producer class used for authority resolution.

producer_id.description: Producer identity used for audit and authority resolution.

replaced_behavior.description: Behavior boundary being corrected or superseded.

route_decisions.description: Requested routing decisions for trusted correction events.

scope_class.description: Scope class where the correction applies.

source_ref.description: Stable source reference for audit and idempotency.

target_identity_ref.description: Target identity, name, or alias to resolve before admission.

target_revision.description: Submitted target revision associated with the correction.

task_class.description: Task class where the correction applies.

trusted_authority_receipt_ref.description: Repo-relative trusted authority receipt ref resolved by AW before an event can gain human/review/evaluator authority. Omit to preserve the event as low-authority self-observation.

title: Correction event operation input
